title: Wonders of Wynn
body:
A transformative Wynncraft experience.

- Full LOD render of Wynn province
- Wynntils + More
- Custom Textures
- Custom main menu & random panoramas
- Heavily Optimized
- Shader support
- Lively Character animations with the Fresh Moves Resource Pack

![Almuj Skyline at Night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/198799f89036236a8dff70e4f1efe2a63e4fc73b.jpeg)
